steps.name: the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page

elements.name: TC04 - Budget Homes listings display prices within ceiling and EMI Calculator computes correctly

steps.name: the user clicks the Buy heading
the user clicks "Budget Homes"
the user switches to the new tab
the first 5 property prices should be displayed
the user clicks on the first property listing
the user switches to the property detail tab
the user clicks the Apply Loan button
the user switches to the loan calculator tab
the user enters loan amount "30,00,000" and interest rate "7.5"
the user selects property not finalized radio button
the user clicks Calculate EMI
the EMI details should be displayed
the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page

elements.name: TC06 - Premium Homes listings are displayed and image gallery navigates correctly

steps.name: the user clicks the Buy heading
the user clicks "Premium Homes"
the user switches to the new tab
the user clicks the search button
the user opens the image gallery of the first property
the user clicks the Project Photo tab
the user should be able to navigate right through 3 gallery images
the user is on the MagicBricks Mumbai residential page
